meta.title: My plate — eat for what you do
meta.description: Simple macro tracking and 50+ recipes built for active people. No scale, no 5-million-food catalog.

hero.title: Eat for what you do, not for what you weigh.
hero.subtitle: Simple macro tracking, recipes calibrated for sport. No need for a scale or a 5-million-food catalog — just what matters.

benefits.context_body: Not just another generic tracker: what you eat is tied to what you do. Not an end in itself — fuel.
benefits.recipes_body: Quick breakfast, post-workout meals, recovery snacks. Bilingual FR/EN, macros shown, clear steps.
benefits.simple_body: Tracking is designed to be sustainable day-to-day — not anxious counting. See what matters, let go of the rest.
benefits.bilingual_body: Recipes are available in both languages with translated URLs, readable and indexable.

final_cta.title: See what your plate changes.
final_cta.subtitle: Create a free account and start to see the link between what you eat and what you do.
